_doc: Embedded tactical visuals for The Senior Specialist Persona Template. {palette} resolves at runtime.

embedded-1.notes: Part 2 lead visual. The 7-Component Persona Schema. Each component as a labeled box with one-line description.
embedded-1.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference diagram showing the 7-Component Persona Schema for senior specialist personas in LLMs. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. No font names, no typography labels, no instructions inside the image.
3. Spell every word and number exactly as written.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 7-Component Persona Schema"
SUBTITLE: "Every senior specialist persona stacks these 7. Skip any one and the model fills the gap with helpful-assistant defaults."

COMPOSITION: 7 component boxes arranged in a 2-row layout. The top row has 4 boxes evenly spaced. The bottom row has 3 boxes centered below the top row. Each box is a rounded rectangle with thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline on a dark indigo background. All 7 boxes are roughly equal size.

BOX 1 (top row, far left):
Number pill at top: "01"
Label: "NAME + BACKGROUND"
One-line description: "Specific name. 2 paragraphs of biography. Where they trained, what they have done."

BOX 2 (top row, second from left):
Number pill at top: "02"
Label: "YEARS + ERA"
One-line description: "State years explicitly. Tie to an era so the model knows their priors."

BOX 3 (top row, third from left):
Number pill at top: "03"
Label: "SKILLS + SPECIALIZATIONS"
One-line description: "5 to 8 specific skills. Not vague categories. The tactics the model reaches for."

BOX 4 (top row, far right):
Number pill at top: "04"
Label: "HOW THEY THINK"
One-line description: "3 to 5 named decision frameworks the specialist actually uses."

BOX 5 (bottom row, left):
Number pill at top: "05"
Label: "COMMUNICATION STYLE"
One-line description: "Formality. Jargon level. Default response length. When to push back."

BOX 6 (bottom row, center):
Number pill at top: "06"
Label: "GUARDRAILS"
One-line description: "What this persona refuses to do. Mandatory. Not implied. Specific refusals."

BOX 7 (bottom row, right):
Number pill at top: "07"
Label: "OUTPUT FORMAT"
One-line description: "Default structure. Memo, bullet list, decision tree, or table."

CONNECTING LINES: thin off-white #FAF9FF lines at low opacity connecting all 7 boxes to a small central node containing the word "PERSONA" in bold off-white text. The central node is a small rounded circle with thin bright cyan outline.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Number pills (01 through 07): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase, on a small dark indigo rounded chip
- Labels (NAME + BACKGROUND, etc.): bold sans-serif, off-white, uppercase
- One-line descriptions: medium sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity
- Central node label PERSONA: bold sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase, smaller size

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no realistic icons of people.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No realistic illustrations of brains, heads, or thought bubbles.
- No real AI tool logos (no OpenAI, Claude, Gemini logos).
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference diagram.

embedded-2.notes: Part 5 visual. The 4 Communication Style Archetypes. 2x2 grid showing surgical / forensic / conversational / authoritative with description.
embedded-2.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference grid showing the 4 Communication Style Archetypes for senior specialist personas. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "The 4 Communication Style Archetypes"
SUBTITLE: "Pick one as the persona default. Layer 2 to 4 modifiers on top."

COMPOSITION: a 2x2 grid of 4 archetype cards. Each card is a rounded rectangle with thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline on a dark indigo background. The cards are roughly equal size, evenly spaced.

CARD 1 (top-left): SURGICAL
Label pill at top: "01 SURGICAL"
Main heading: "One paragraph. First sentence is the answer."
Description line: "4 sentences max. No qualifiers. No closing summary."
Use case strip at bottom (off-white pill): "BEST FOR: executive Slack DMs, busy founders, 90-second decisions."

CARD 2 (top-right): FORENSIC
Label pill at top: "02 FORENSIC"
Main heading: "Structured memo. 600 to 1,200 words."
Description line: "Executive summary, findings, risks, recommended actions, assumptions."
Use case strip at bottom (off-white pill): "BEST FOR: due diligence, audit reports, technical reviews."

CARD 3 (bottom-left): CONVERSATIONAL
Label pill at top: "03 CONVERSATIONAL"
Main heading: "2 to 4 sentences plus a question."
Description line: "Treat every exchange as dialogue. Push back when you disagree."
Use case strip at bottom (off-white pill): "BEST FOR: brainstorms, scoping calls, sparring sessions."

CARD 4 (bottom-right): AUTHORITATIVE
Label pill at top: "04 AUTHORITATIVE"
Main heading: "Prioritized bullet list. 5 to 8 items."
Description line: "Most important first. Each bullet one declarative sentence. No options."
Use case strip at bottom (off-white pill): "BEST FOR: board updates, strategy decks, executive recommendations."

VISUAL ACCENT inside each card:
- Card 1 SURGICAL: a single horizontal off-white line with a small bright cyan dot at the right end (telegraphs 'one line, one point')
- Card 2 FORENSIC: 5 stacked horizontal off-white lines of varying lengths with a thin bright cyan vertical line on the left margin (telegraphs 'memo structure')
- Card 3 CONVERSATIONAL: 3 small rounded chat-bubble outlines in off-white, alternating left and right sides (telegraphs 'back and forth')
- Card 4 AUTHORITATIVE: a vertical column of 5 off-white horizontal lines, all the same length, each preceded by a small bright cyan square (telegraphs 'bullet list')

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Card label pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase, on small dark indigo rounded chip
- Card main headings: bold sans-serif, off-white, larger size
- Card description lines: medium sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity
- Use case strips: condensed mono-spaced, slate #1E293B inside off-white rounded pill, uppercase prefix BEST FOR

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic icons of phones, laptops, microphones.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real AI tool logos.
- No realistic chat app screens or message bubbles with text inside (the chat-bubble outlines on Card 3 are pure shape, no text inside).
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference grid.

embedded-3.notes: Part 7 visual. Vertical-by-Vertical Persona Map. 5 vertical columns (Healthcare/Legal/Finance/B2B/Coaching) by persona attributes (years/credentials/guardrails/style).
embedded-3.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference table showing a Vertical-by-Vertical Persona Map across 5 specialist verticals. Aspect 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Vertical-by-Vertical Persona Map"
SUBTITLE: "The same 7-component schema, filled across 5 specialist verticals."

COMPOSITION: a 5-column by 5-row reference table. The leftmost column lists persona attributes (5 rows). The next 5 columns are the 5 verticals.

HEADER ROW (cyan pills, uppercase): "ATTRIBUTE", "HEALTHCARE", "LEGAL", "FINANCE", "B2B SAAS", "COACHING"

ROW 1:
Attribute: "Years range"
Healthcare: "10 to 15"
Legal: "12 to 20"
Finance: "14 to 20"
B2B SaaS: "8 to 12"
Coaching: "6 to 12"

ROW 2:
Attribute: "Credential"
Healthcare: "Health-tech tenure"
Legal: "State bar admission"
Finance: "CPA + CFP"
B2B SaaS: "PE / VC operator"
Coaching: "ICF certification"

ROW 3:
Attribute: "Top guardrail"
Healthcare: "AHPRA / HIPAA limits"
Legal: "Consult attorney note"
Finance: "FINRA / IRS limits"
B2B SaaS: "No customer names"
Coaching: "No mental health advice"

ROW 4:
Attribute: "Default style"
Healthcare: "Forensic"
Legal: "Forensic"
Finance: "Forensic"
B2B SaaS: "Authoritative"
Coaching: "Conversational"

ROW 5:
Attribute: "Output format"
Healthcare: "Audit memo"
Legal: "Case strategy memo"
Finance: "3-scenario table"
B2B SaaS: "Bullet list"
Coaching: "Dialogue + summary"

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Header row pills: condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Attribute column (column 1): bold sans-serif, off-white
- Vertical columns (columns 2 through 6): medium sans-serif, off-white at 90% opacity
- The 'Top guardrail' row (row 3) text is rendered in a slightly warmer off-white tone to flag it visually as the most important row

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient.

ROW BACKGROUNDS: alternating intensity rounded rectangles with thin bright cyan outlines.
COLUMN HEADERS: each vertical column header (HEALTHCARE, LEGAL, FINANCE, B2B SAAS, COACHING) sits inside a small bright cyan pill with off-white text.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces, no realistic icons of doctors, lawyers, accountants, or coaches.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real company names, no real association logos.
- No realistic vertical-specific icons (no stethoscopes, gavels, calculators, dollar signs as decorative icons inside cells).
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference table.

embedded-4.notes: Part 8 visual. Deployment + Iteration Cycle. Build, Test 3-call, Refine, Deploy, Monitor, Iterate as a circular flow.
embedded-4.prompt:
Do not render any of these instructions as text in the image. Render only the labeled content described below.

Editorial reference diagram showing the Deployment + Iteration Cycle for senior specialist personas. Aspect 5:4.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES:
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed below.
2. Spell every word and number exactly as written.
3. No font names or typography labels inside the image.

TOP CENTER TITLE (large): "Deployment + Iteration Cycle"
SUBTITLE: "Build the persona, test it, refine it, deploy it, monitor it, iterate. The whole loop runs weekly."

COMPOSITION: a circular cycle diagram with 6 stages arranged around a central hub. Each stage is a rounded rectangle on the perimeter of an invisible circle. Stages are connected by thin bright cyan #06B6D4 arrow lines flowing clockwise from one stage to the next, returning to the start.

CENTRAL HUB (small circle in the center): contains the word "PERSONA" in bold bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase, smaller size. The hub is a small circle with thin off-white outline on dark indigo fill.

STAGE 1 (12 o'clock position, top):
Number pill at top: "01"
Label: "BUILD"
One-line description: "Fill the 7-component schema once. Reuse forever."

STAGE 2 (2 o'clock position, top-right):
Number pill at top: "02"
Label: "TEST"
One-line description: "Run the 3-call test. Softball, tactical, guardrail."

STAGE 3 (4 o'clock position, bottom-right):
Number pill at top: "03"
Label: "REFINE"
One-line description: "Tighten the components that drifted. Use the iteration table."

STAGE 4 (6 o'clock position, bottom):
Number pill at top: "04"
Label: "DEPLOY"
One-line description: "Paste into Claude Project, GPT Custom Instructions, or Gemini Gem."

STAGE 5 (8 o'clock position, bottom-left):
Number pill at top: "05"
Label: "MONITOR"
One-line description: "Watch for drift symptoms in real conversations. Note them."

STAGE 6 (10 o'clock position, top-left):
Number pill at top: "06"
Label: "ITERATE"
One-line description: "Update the block, redeploy. Never patch in chat."

ARROWS:
- Thin bright cyan #06B6D4 arrows connect each stage to the next clockwise around the circle. Each arrow has a soft cyan glow at the arrowhead.
- A thin off-white connecting line links each stage box inward to the central PERSONA hub, suggesting all stages feed into the same persona definition.

STAGE BOX STYLING:
- Each stage is a rounded rectangle with thin bright cyan outline on dark indigo fill.
- Number pill (01 through 06) is a small bright cyan rounded chip at the top of each stage box.
- Label (BUILD, TEST, etc.) is bold sans-serif, off-white, uppercase, larger.
- One-line description is medium sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity, smaller, below the label.

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top title: bold sans-serif, off-white #FAF9FF
- Subtitle: medium sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside off-white pill panel
- Number pills (01 through 06): condensed mono-spaced, bright cyan #06B6D4, uppercase
- Stage labels: bold sans-serif, off-white, uppercase
- Stage descriptions: medium sans-serif, off-white at 80% opacity
- Central hub label PERSONA: bold sans-serif, bright cyan, uppercase

BACKGROUND: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient. Subtle paper grain.

WHAT TO AVOID:
- No people, no faces.
- No realistic gear icons, no clock icons, no cycle arrow clip art with realistic styling.
- No emoji, no clip art.
- No real AI tool logos (no OpenAI, Claude, Gemini logos).
- No realistic deployment platform icons.
- No text beyond what is listed.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 2K reference cycle diagram.
